en.text: a primitive root; or perhaps a denominative from H2947, from dandling on the palms to flatten out or extend (as a tent); figuratively, to nurse achild (as promotive of growth);

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; or perhaps a denominative from H2947, from dandling on the palms to flatten out or extend (as a tent); figuratively, to nurse achild (as promotive of growth);
